title: campanula macrorhiza subsp. catalanica
intro: Campanula macrorhiza subsp. catalanica, also known as the large-leaved bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family, characterized by its large, oval-shaped leaves and blue-purple flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Campanula macrorhiza subsp. catalanica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to benefit from its medicinal properties.
